nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 常綠森林
nodes.summary: 常綠森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联442种鸟类，包括紫冠雉、角冠雉、Razor-billed curassow等442种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 塔帕若斯河
nodes.summary: 塔帕若斯河是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联40种鸟类，包括细嘴隐蜂鸟、塔帕諾斯隱蜂鳥、Amazonian trogon等40种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Tapajos fire-eye
nodes.summary: Tapajos fire-eye（Tapajos fire-eye，学名 Pyriglena similis），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于塔帕若斯河、欣古河、常綠森林，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

nodes.name: 欣古河
nodes.summary: 欣古河是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联18种鸟类，包括塔帕諾斯隱蜂鳥、Pearly parakeet、Snethlage's tody-tyrant等18种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Tapajos fire-eye is found in central Amazonian Brazil south of the Amazon between the Tapajos and Xingu rivers

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Tapajos fire-eye is found in central Amazonian Brazil south of the Amazon between the Tapajos and Xingu rivers

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It inhabits dense understorey vegetation in lowland evergreen forest

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: In 2016 it assessed the white-backed fire-eye as being of Least Concern, with an unknown population size whose trend is also unknown. "Due to its relatively small distribution, it may be more at risk from habitat destruction than other species, though it is more capable than many forest birds of persisting in older second growth."
